description: Safari cookies parser reads Cookies.db SQLite (newer Safari 12+) and emits BrowserEvent per cookie
steps: Query: SELECT name, value, domain, path, creation, expiry, is_secure, is_httponly FROM cookies WHERE creation > 0 ORDER BY creation ASC
Timestamp: safari_to_unix_ns(creation) from crate::history — creation is Core Data f64 seconds
Description: '{domain} — {name}'. Attrs: name, domain, path, expiry (f64), is_secure (bool), is_httponly (bool)
Test factory creates cookies table matching this schema
Test: parse_single_safari_cookie — attrs[domain] and attrs[name] correct
